description: You are a District Medical Officer in Bo District (http://localhost:8080, admin/district). Create a line chart showing the cumulative monthly trend of 'Malaria RDT Positive' cases for Bo District for the year 2023. The visualization must include a target line at 25,000 labeled 'Annual Projection' and a base line at 5,000 labeled 'Minimum Threshold'. Save the visualization as a favorite named 'Bo Malaria Cumulative Analysis 2023'.
